title: select with coalesce
poc: CREATE TABLE CASE_TBL ( i integer, f double precision );
CREATE TABLE CASE2_TBL ( i integer, j integer );
SELECT * FROM CASE_TBL a, CASE2_TBL b WHERE COALESCE(a.f, b.i, b.j) = 2;
key_bug_features: COALESCE function in SQL SELECT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TEST_TBL ( id integer PRIMARY KEY, value1 double precision, value2 integer, value3 varchar(50) );
INSERT INTO TEST_TBL (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (1, NULL, 2, 'test1');
INSERT INTO TEST_TBL (id, value1, value2, value3) VALUES (2, 3.5, NULL, 'test2');
SELECT COALESCE(value1, value2, 0) AS result FROM TEST_TBL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT value3 FROM TEST_TBL WHERE id = 2), 'default') AS result;
